chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI J. Misc. Application No. 22 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order on CMA No.3577/2025 16.01.2026 Ms. Alizay Mehak, advocate for applicants Kh. Shoaib Mansoor, advocate for respondents ---------- Counsel for applicant submits that the subject patent No.142172 in J.M.No.22/2024 has expired on 19.07.2025, hence, Counsel no longer wishes to proceed with this J. Misc. which may be dismissed as withdrawn. Counsels are at ad-idem that this withdrawal is without prejudice to the rights of the parties in J. Misc. Application No.21/2024. Order accordingly. J. Misc. Application stands dismissed in the above terms. J U D G E Ashraf
